zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Belsher於1460年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾亞特時，她的父親John Belsire27歲，母親Elizabeth23歲。她於1478年與John Neale在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1515年在她的家鄉享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Belsher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Busher
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Belcher   or   Bosher  .
Irish (Wexford): Hibernicized form of   Butcher  . This was the name of an Anglo-Norman family in Wexford.

variants.name: Belcher
meanings: from Old French bel ch(i)ere or beu ch(i)ere (Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + ch(i)ere ‘face, countenance’), which had various senses, including ‘fair face or looks, fine manners, good company, good cheer, food and drink, hospitality’. Although ch(i)ere originally meant ‘face’, the word later came to mean also ‘demeanor, disposition’ (hence English cheer), and the nickname may thus also have denoted a person of pleasant, cheerful disposition.

from Old French bel, beu + sire ‘fair sir’, a term of address. From at least the 15th century this name was probably confused with the name above, owing to the pronunciation of Middle English beu sire and bel sire as ‘bewcher’ and ‘belsher’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Belsher was born in 1460, in Yate, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Belsire, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth, was 23. She married John Neale in 1478, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1515, in her hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Belsher est née en 1460, à Yate, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Belsire, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé John Neale en 1478, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1515, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

Sie hat 1478 in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom John Neale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1515 im Alter von 55 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato John Neale nel 1478, nel Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1515, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Belsher(이)가 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 야트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Belsire(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루그h에서 John Neale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1515년 그녀의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Belsher родилась в 1460 г. в местности ят, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Belsire было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Neale в 1478 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1515 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.
